candidate_generator.roman_edit_candidates: bounded Roman edit generation: j-to-z alias bases, lowercase-o to uppercase-O bases for vowel-sparse inputs, missing-vowel insertion between non-identical adjacent roman consonants, priority two-gap/final-vowel variants, capped at 24 generated outputs

metrics.scope: model artifact metrics captured before the runtime two-gap missing-vowel generator update; rerun full eval when the next cleaned training/eval split is rebuilt

spot_checks.okalpokko: অকালপক্ক is rank 1 in the shipped playground suggestions
spot_checks.kmn: কেমন is rank 1 with the runtime two-gap missing-vowel generator and shipped char reranker
spot_checks.tmr: তোমার is rank 1 with the runtime O-aware sparse missing-vowel generator and shipped char reranker
spot_checks.kthay: কোথায় is visible in the shipped suggestions with generated-candidate evidence; it remains suggestion-only because কথায় is also a valid deterministic output
spot_checks.jmn: যেমন is visible with generated-candidate evidence from the bounded j-to-z alias plus missing-vowel path
spot_checks.krbo: করবো is rank 1 with the runtime lowercase-o to uppercase-O generated base and shipped char reranker
